zh.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan是Iorwerth ap Madog的兒子，於大約1270年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾。他和Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan是Iorwerth ap Madog的儿子，于大约1270年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾。他和Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
meanings: A Cornish form of Edward.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Gwarin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Avelino, Carlos, Jose, Urbano, Ana Cecilia, Aracely, Armando, Camilo, Diego, Dioselina, Eduvina.
Spanish and Catalan: Castilianized form (Guarín) of Guarí, a cognate of Guarino . This surname is most common in Colombia and the Philippines.

variants.name: Guarino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Pasquale, Sal, Aldo, Carmela, Francesco, Vincenzo, Carmine.

Italian and Spanish: from the personal name Guarino, from ancient Germanic Warino, Latinized as Guarinus, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’.

nameMeanings.name: Ynyr
meanings: Welsh: An old Welsh form of Honorius

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan was born about 1270, in Monmouthshire, Wales as the son of Iorwerth ap Madog. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.

fr.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan est né environ 1270, à Monmouthshire, Galles, fils de Iorwerth ap Madog. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.

de.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan wurde um 1270 in Monmouthshire, Wales, als Sohn von Iorwerth ap Madog geboren. Er hatte mit Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan è nato il circa 1270 nel Monmouthshire, Galles come figlio di Iorwerth ap Madog. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.

ja.Merionethshire, Wales: ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイア
ja.Llan-ffwyst, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychanは約1270年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでIorwerth ap Madogの息子として生まれた。彼はJane ferch Hywel Or Howell xとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan(은)는 대략 1270년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Iorwerth ap Madog의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Monmouthshire, Gales filho de Iorwerth ap Madog. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.

ru.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan родился около 1270 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс. Его отца звали Iorwerth ap Madog. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.

es.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Fychan ap Iorwerth ap Gwarin ap Caradog ap Ynyr Fychan nació aproximadamente 1270, en Monmouthshire, Gales como hijo de Iorwerth ap Madog. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Jane ferch Hywel Or Howell x.
